workflow.name: SonarQube HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate SonarQube HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare SonarQube inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/sonarqube-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[sonarqube]
10.31.110.11 role=quality name=sonarqube-01
10.31.110.12 role=quality name=sonarqube-02
10.31.110.13 role=quality name=sonarqube-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install SonarQube container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/sonarqube-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: sonarqube
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/sonarqube-inventory.ini /tmp/sonarqube-runtime.yml

data.label: Render SonarQube cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/sonarqube-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: sonarqube
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/sonarqube
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/sonarqube/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            sonarqube:
              image: sonarqube:10-community
              container_name: octastack-sonarqube
              restart: unless-stopped
              environment:
                SONAR_ES_BOOTSTRAP_CHECKS_DISABLE: "true"
              ports:
                - "9000:9000"
              volumes:
                - data:/opt/sonarqube/data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy SonarQube cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/sonarqube-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/sonarqube/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/sonarqube/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/sonarqube/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/sonarqube-inventory.ini /tmp/sonarqube-deploy.yml

data.label: Document SonarQube topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/sonarqube-topology.md <<'EOF'
# SonarQube HA topology

Members:
- sonarqube-01: 10.31.110.11 (quality)
- sonarqube-02: 10.31.110.12 (quality)
- sonarqube-03: 10.31.110.13 (quality)

This example deploys one SonarQube container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/sonarqube-topology.md

data.label: Validate SonarQube cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/sonarqube-inventory.ini sonarqube -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
